vlan 1 name DEFAULT-VLAN by port
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!
vlan 10 name wireless by port
 tagged ethe 1/1/19 to 1/1/20 ethe 1/2/1 ethe 1/2/3 to 1/2/8
 router-interface ve 10
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
!

 tagged ethe 1/1/19 to 1/1/20 ethe 1/1/22 ethe 1/2/3 ethe 1/2/7 to 1/2/8
 untagged ethe 1/1/1 to 1/1/18 ethe 1/1/24 ethe 1/2/1 ethe 1/2/4 to 1/2/6
 router-interface ve 1
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
 multicast passive
!

 tagged ethe 1/1/15 ethe 1/1/19 to 1/1/20 ethe 1/2/1 ethe 1/2/3 to 1/2/8
 untagged ethe 1/1/21 ethe 1/1/23 ethe 1/2/2
 spanning-tree 802-1w
 spanning-tree 802-1w priority 4096
 multicast passive
